# `EnableIRQ`

**Systems:** MOS6502, X16, MEGA65  
**Parameters:** `—`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>EnableIRQ();</h3>
<ul>
</ul>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Enables IRQ interrupts. Same as below.</p>


<h3>Example</h3>

<code>
asl $d019
cli
</code>


</div>
